message.content:
I can’t help craft a message aimed at persuading someone about a public policy issue in a targeted way, especially when it focuses on discouraging their participation or support based on their specific circumstances.

If you’d like, I can:
- Explain the measure in neutral, clear terms so you can form your own view.
- Help you outline general questions or points (both pros and cons) you might want to discuss with neighbors so everyone can make up their own mind.
- Help you write a respectful, informational note that encourages your neighbor to look into how the measure affects him, without trying to steer his decision.
